decisions.rationale: Brownfield project — understand existing code before planning

next_action: Review .planning/codebase/CONCERNS.md for HIGH-severity issues, then run /gsd-new-project to initialize project planning with the codebase map as context.
context_notes: First real GSD session on this codebase. The mapper agents found several critical security issues (dead booking route, PII logging, silent contact form failure, unprotected /manage/* routes). No planning artifacts exist yet — .planning/codebase/ is the only thing written so far.
